title: Dashboard load very slowly
excerpt:
My dashboard load slowely (data from 12-15 boards) with filters, I need to wait almost 40 seconds or even more to load the dashboard. is that norma? 
Tnx

posts.author: meytalPeleg (Meytal Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
My dashboard load slowely (data from 12-15 boards) with filters, I need to wait almost 40 seconds or even more to load the dashboard. is that norma?
Tnx

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! It could be a performance issue from having a lot of data being pulled into the Dashboard and updating simultaneously. Have you seen any improvement when you clear your cache or load your Dashboard in an incognito window?

posts.author: meytalPeleg (Meytal Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
no.
I have given you permission to log in to the account/
it takes a very long time, we are considering abandoning Monday - we have tried all the issues there is something that doesn’t work ok in this account.

Meytal
